title: Mumbai Concert Drug Horror: 2 MBA Students Dead, One Critical; Event Organiser Among 6 Arrested
description: The incident took place late on April 11, when over 2,000 people, including students from a reputed MBA college, had gathered at a live concert in Mumbai’s NESCO Ground. Police suspect the involvement of party drugs such as MDMA (ecstasy), though the exact cause of death will be confirmed only after reports.
